exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left")
print(len(m))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"]})
print(bool(cli["cliente_id"].is_unique))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C001"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="inner")
print(len(m))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
left = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
right = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1]})
try:
    left.merge(right, on="id", validate="one_to_one")
except Exception:
    print("fail")
exercises.note: Theory validate fails broken cardinality; hints try Exception.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002", "C003"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
orphans = m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only"]
print(len(orphans))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 2], "a": [10, 20], "b": [30, 40]})
long = df.melt(id_vars="id", value_vars=["a", "b"])
print(len(long))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "k": ["a", "b"], "v": [10, 20]})
p = df.pivot_table(index="id", columns="k", values="v", aggfunc="sum").reset_index()
print(p.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({"x": [1]})
b = pd.DataFrame({"x": [2]})
print(len(pd.concat([a, b], ignore_index=True)))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({("sum", "a"): [1], ("sum", "b"): [2]})
df.columns = [f"{a}_{b}" for a, b in df.columns]
print(df.columns.tolist())
exercises.note: Hints map join after pivot MultiIndex.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1], "b": [2]})
expected = {"a", "b"}
print(set(df.columns) == expected)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
df = df.rename(columns={"a": "monto"})
print(df.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 7.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 20.0, 7.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].transform("mean").tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 7.0]})
out = df.groupby("region", as_index=False).agg(total=("monto", "sum"), n=("monto", "count"))
print(out.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3]).rolling(2).mean()
out = [None if pd.isna(v) else float(v) for v in s.tolist()]
print(out)
exercises.note: Hints rolling mean; first nan as None.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01", "2024-02-01"]),
})
tx["cohort"] = tx.groupby("cliente_id")["fecha"].transform("min").dt.to_period("M").astype(str)
print(tx.drop_duplicates("cliente_id").set_index("cliente_id")["cohort"].to_dict())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 3.0, 5.0], index=pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-01-02", "2024-01-03"]))
s = s.sort_index()
print(float(s.rolling(2).mean().iloc[-1]))
exercises.note: Hints sort then rolling 2; last mean.

exercises.code:
parts = [10.0, 20.0, 70.0]
total = 100.0
print(abs(sum(parts) - total) < 1e-9)

activos = 40
pagados = 10
print(pagados / activos)

total = 100
lima = 60
residual = total - lima
print(residual)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
print(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
pre = float(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].sum())
total = float(tx["monto"].sum())
print(total - pre)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
feat = tx[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff].groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max()
print(feat.to_dict())
exercises.note: Hints filter then groupby max; demo as-of style.
